test.create_query: CREATE TABLE lift_perf_orders (k UInt64, payload String) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY k
CREATE TABLE lift_perf_lineitem (k UInt64, payload String) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY k
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO lift_perf_orders SELECT number, toString(number) FROM numbers(10000000)
INSERT INTO lift_perf_lineitem SELECT number, toString(number) FROM numbers(10000000)
test.query: SELECT count() FROM (SELECT * FROM lift_perf_orders WHERE k = 1234567) AS o INNER JOIN lift_perf_lineitem AS l ON o.k = l.k SETTINGS query_plan_lift_predicate_across_join = 1
SELECT count() FROM (SELECT * FROM lift_perf_orders WHERE k = 1234567) AS o INNER JOIN lift_perf_lineitem AS l ON o.k = l.k SETTINGS query_plan_lift_predicate_across_join = 0
SELECT sum(l.k) FROM (SELECT * FROM lift_perf_orders WHERE k BETWEEN 100000 AND 100100) AS o LEFT JOIN lift_perf_lineitem AS l ON o.k = l.k SETTINGS query_plan_lift_predicate_across_join = 1
SELECT sum(l.k) FROM (SELECT * FROM lift_perf_orders WHERE k BETWEEN 100000 AND 100100) AS o LEFT JOIN lift_perf_lineitem AS l ON o.k = l.k SETTINGS query_plan_lift_predicate_across_join = 0
